name: Election to Apply Regulations Retroactively

eligibility.description: Available when the Treasury Department issues new regulations that are favorable to the taxpayer and explicitly allows for an election to apply them to prior open tax years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers may elect to apply new Treasury regulations to a taxable period ending before the regulation's effective date if the Secretary provides for such an election.
